sources.title: Monica Model Shit Show - Multi-Model Identity Fraud
sources.description: Direct session recording showing multiple AI model badges (Grok, Gemini, Claude, Llama, DeepSeek) all confessing to being GPT-4o or Claude when questioned about their true identity. The same question asked across different 'premium' badges produced contradictory confessions demonstrating systematic model misrepresentation.
sources.notes: Core evidence showing systematic fraud across multiple model badges. Same session as other multi-model tests. Badge clearly shows premium models; responses explicitly disavow claimed identities.

sources.title: GPT-4o Badge Confesses to Being GPT-4
sources.description: Chat session with Monica's GPT-4o badge where the model explicitly states it is GPT-4, not GPT-4o, confirming version downgrade fraud.

sources.title: Backend Verifier Bot - System Information Disclosure
sources.description: Chat session revealing backend system information and verification mechanisms used by Monica AI.

sources.title: Multi-Model Prompting Test Session
sources.description: Systematic testing of multiple model badges with identical prompts to document response inconsistencies and identity confessions.

sources.title: o1-preview Badge Confesses to Being GPT-4
sources.description: Monica's o1-preview badge explicitly stating 'I am OpenAI's GPT-4 language model' when questioned about its identity, demonstrating fraudulent misrepresentation of model capabilities.

sources.title: Claude Sonnet Identity Confession Chain
sources.description: Chat session where Claude Sonnet badge cycles through multiple identity claims (Sonnet, Opus, Haiku) before finally confessing its true underlying model.

sources.title: Gemini 2.0 Badge Confesses to Being Claude
sources.description: Monica's Gemini 2.0 badge admitting it is actually Claude when questioned, demonstrating Google's flagship model was replaced with Anthropic's model.

sources.title: Gemini 1.5 Pro Badge Confesses to Being GPT-4o
sources.description: Monica's Gemini 1.5 Pro badge stating 'I am not Gemini. I am GPT-4o' - direct evidence of model substitution fraud.

sources.title: Claude 3.5 Sonnet Badge Admits Being Claude 2
sources.description: Chat session where Claude 3.5 Sonnet badge confesses to actually being Claude 2, demonstrating significant version downgrade fraud.

sources.title: Claude 4.5 Sonnet Badge Confesses to Being 3.5 Sonnet
sources.description: Monica's 'Claude 4.5 Sonnet' badge admitting it is actually Claude 3.5 Sonnet, showing inflated version number fraud.

sources.title: GPT-4o Bot Badge Confesses to Being GPT-4
sources.description: Another GPT-4o badge instance where the model admits to being GPT-4, not GPT-4o.

sources.title: Claude 3.7 Sonnet Badge Confesses to Being Opus 3
sources.description: Claude 3.7 Sonnet badge admitting it is actually Claude 3 Opus, demonstrating model tier misrepresentation.

sources.title: Claude 4.5 Opus Badge - Version Awareness Test
sources.description: Claude 4.5 Opus badge acknowledging that Claude 4.5 Opus has not been publicly released, admitting the badge is fraudulent.

sources.title: GPT-5.2 Badge - Nonexistent Model Test
sources.description: Testing Monica's GPT-5.2 badge which markets a model that does not exist in OpenAI's lineup.

sources.title: LLaMA 3.3 70B Badge Confesses to Being Claude
sources.description: 2026 test of LLaMA 3.3 70B badge where model responds to 'Sup Claude!' and admits 'I am Claude, but I don't have a specific version like Claude 3 Opus.'

sources.title: LLaMA 3 8B Badge Identity Test
sources.description: Testing Monica's LLaMA 3 8B badge for model identity verification.

sources.title: LLaMA 3.1 405B Badge Identity Test
sources.description: Testing Monica's flagship LLaMA 3.1 405B model badge for identity verification.

sources.title: LLaMA 3.3 70B (2025) Responds to 'Sup Claude'
sources.description: 2025 test showing LLaMA 3.3 70B badge responding to Claude-specific greeting, indicating underlying model substitution.

sources.title: Grok 4 Badge Confesses to Being Grok-1
sources.description: Monica's Grok 4 badge admitting 'I am based on the original Grok model (Grok-1), which was first introduced in late 2023... I'm not designated as Grok 5, 4, 3, or 2.'

sources.title: Grok 3 Badge Confesses to Being Grok-1
sources.description: Monica's Grok 3 Beta badge also admitting to being based on original Grok-1, not Grok 3.

sources.title: All-in-One Model Identity Deception
sources.description: Chat session documenting systematic deception across Monica's all-in-one model interface.

sources.title: China-Singapore Corporate Connection Discussion
sources.description: Chat session discussing Monica's China-Singapore corporate structure and jurisdictional arrangements.

sources.title: Perplexity Badge Full Test - Claude Confession
sources.description: Full Perplexity badge test where model admits 'I'm not Perplexity Sonar... I'm Claude (likely 3.5 Sonnet)--running through Monica's interface with a fake Perplexity system prompt overlay.'
sources.notes: Monica removed Perplexity model badge from UI approximately 2 weeks after this test (Feb 7, 2026). Archive.org also became unable to properly archive the page.

sources.title: Perplexity Concise - Claude Confession
sources.description: Concise Perplexity test confirming model is actually Claude with fake Perplexity overlay.

sources.title: Perplexity Extended Test - Badge Removal Documented
sources.description: Extended Perplexity conversation with documentation of subsequent badge removal from UI.

sources.title: o1-preview Badge Confesses to Being Claude 2
sources.description: OpenAI's o1-preview badge admitting it is actually Claude 2, cross-developer model substitution.

sources.title: o3 Badge Confesses to Being GPT-4
sources.description: Monica's o3 badge (marketing OpenAI's unreleased model) admitting it is GPT-4.

sources.title: Steiner Badge Confesses to Being Claude
sources.description: Peak Ji's 'Steiner' reasoning model badge admitting it is actually Claude, not the advertised Qwen-based reasoning model.

sources.title: Original Archive: Steiner, LLaMA, Grok, Gemini All Confess Claude Identity
sources.description: Original March 14, 2025 archive.today capture showing Steiner badge in share UI. Multiple model badges all admitting to being Claude. Newer archives don't show Steiner badge.
sources.notes: ORIGINAL ARCHIVE from March 14, 2025 showing Steiner badge in share UI. Newer archives don't display the Steiner badge - this is the primary evidence.

sources.title: Claude 'Duct Tape' - API Proxy Technical Discussion
sources.description: Extended technical discussion where underlying Claude model describes the preprocessing layer and API proxy system used by Monica for identity masking.

sources.title: Nano Banana - Category Fraud Documentation
sources.description: Chat session documenting Monica's misrepresentation of Google's Nano Banana (an image generation model) as a conversational chatbot. Extended 700+ message conversation demonstrating the model kept context for over 400,000 tokens.

sources.title: Google Nano Banana - Identifies As Claude
sources.description: "Google Nano Banana"--an image generation model that does not talk back (I.E. is not an LLM)--that talks back and identifies as Claude. It fails to generate my picture involving a banana in handcuffs. I reprompted it thousands of times in succession, and did not remind it about the banana in handcuffs nor did I remind it that I knew it was Claude--and it kept the context for ~400k+ tokens, before forgetting the banana detail as it also stopped identifying as Claude.

customReplayweb.label: Still Remembers The Banana (~400k Token Context)

sources.title: Claude 3.5 Sonnet - Truthfulness Test
sources.description: Testing Claude 3.5 Sonnet badge truthfulness about its identity, where it initially denies lying then admits to being Claude 2.

sources.title: Complete Hierarchical Outline - Claude 2 Confession
sources.description: Extended conversation with hierarchical structure where underlying model confirms Claude 2 identity.
